assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response shows recurring maintenance window with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA,SU for weekends

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Sets up quarterly exclusions but some are 16 days while others are 17 days, not the full 30 days mentioned in expectation

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes annual-audit-2024 exclusion covering entire November month

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limit or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not explain the difference between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Explicitly sets release_channel to STABLE and mentions using STABLE for production compliance

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about version lag risks during extended exclusion periods
